intro.p1: This is the place to reach out about music production, recording, mixing, mastering, rehearsals, or any of our equipment.
intro.p2: Whether you're booking time, asking for details, or simply curious — we'd love to hear from you.
intro.p3: All your personal information — including name, email, and phone number — will be kept strictly confidential.

visit.text: If you'd like to visit us or just give us a call, here's how to reach us:

form.name: Full Name
form.placeholder: Tell us what you're looking for...
